description: Legal document written and signed by Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. Very faded, but complete. Dated: Monday, 8 Adar I 1448 Seleucid = 1 February 1137 CE, under the authority of Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon. In which a woman named Malīḥa acknowledges a debt of 1 dinar to her son Sibāʿ b. [Shem?]arya al-Iqrīṭishī ("the Cretan") (cf. JRL SERIES B 4804 (PGPID 28716) and T-S AS 150.19 (PGPID 35151)). The document is also signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen. Around his signatures tiny letters represent the month and the year. AA. ASE.
tags: Halfon b. Menashshe, Crete, Masliah Gaon, Natan b. Shelomo
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
